prompt: This parses untrusted XML. What is the correct fix?

options.text: Disable DTDs and external entity resolution on the parser factory (e.g. disallow-doctype-decl = true)
Encrypt the XML payload in transit

explanation: Turning off DTD processing and external entities on the factory removes the XXE attack surface entirely (CWE-611). Validating against an XSD happens after the entities already resolved, so it is too late; transport encryption and memory limits don't address entity expansion.
